title: cleanup: remove duplicate models news migration
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Removes the first of two identical `_migrate_old_snapshot` definitions in `generate_models_news.py`.
- Leaves the remaining definition and call path unchanged.

## Validation
- `python3 -m py_compile social/scripts/generate_models_news.py`
- `rg -n "def _migrate_old_snapshot|_migrate_old_snapshot\(" social/scripts/generate_models_news.py`
- `git diff --check origin/main`

gist.headline: Double Vision Fixed
gist.blurb: Swept up some duplicate code in our internal social media scripts. Keeping the hive tidy!
gist.summary: Removed a duplicate definition of the `_migrate_old_snapshot` function in the internal social media news generation script.
gist.impact: Improves code maintainability for the internal social media pipeline without affecting any user-facing functionality.
gist.visual_concept: The bee and the nomnom creature cleaning up duplicate papers/code. Nomnom eating the extra copy to keep things tidy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a duplicate stack of code printouts while the cute bee mascot watches holding a tiny broom. A retro computer monitor in the background glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
